query:
ALTER TABLE ai_assessments 
ADD COLUMN is_reanalysis TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN triggered_by INT,
ADD COLUMN triggered_role VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN previous_assessment_id INT,
ADD COLUMN reanalysis_reason TEXT,
ADD COLUMN version_number INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1;
